platform_decisions.content: Export renders via chunked streaming (40 msgs/chunk) for memory footprint control; filename from first prompt truncated to 50 chars
Session resume in 3 phases: worktree chdir, session ID reuse (or fork), agent definition refresh
Startup hook execution strict order: bare mode check then plugin hooks then SessionStart then watch paths then return
Cross-platform path expansion: POSIX to Windows conversion, null-byte rejection, NFC normalization
Platform-specific permission guidance: Windows/macOS/Linux microphone paths
Voice mode sequential gating: build-time feature then runtime enabled then available then stream then deps then mic permission
Config source unification: global (process-level) + settings (project/user) with path-based nested object updates
Session activity heartbeat: refcount-based 30s interval timer gated by env var
Cleanup registration pattern: global registry with unregister functions, concurrent Promise.all on shutdown
Async hook timeout (default 15s) with 1s progress intervals and stdout/stderr collection
Deep link URI validation: q (5000 chars), cwd (4096 chars), repo (owner/name slug), control char rejection
Cron task auto-expiration: maxAgeMs-based aging for non-permanent recurring tasks
Cron scheduler lock with 5s re-probe and missed task detection on startup gap
Worktree session persistence: state saved to metadata, chdir as TOCTOU check on resume
File rendering normalization upper bound: chunk ceiling computed from normalized message count bounds
Context window token tracking from API responses; cache tokens excluded per specific contexts
Content replacement record seeding on fork-session to preserve tool_use_id cache hits
Coordinator mode metadata persistence with mismatch warning on resume
Model override on agent restore: agent model applied if user didnt specify --model
Standalone agent context derivation: name/color from session computed at initial state
Slow operation threshold adaptive: 20ms dev, 300ms ant, Infinity external; re-entrancy guarded
